creator: amir@active.ath.cx
text:
I first saw vmware doesn't work anymore, /compat/linux/dev/vmnet1 
	doesn't reponse, then I tried /compat/linux/dev/null and saw its
	something to do with all compat linux devices.

Fix: 

I dont know.
How-To-Repeat: 	Use lastest freebsd 4.3-rc from cvsup
	FreeBSD active.ath.cx 4.3-RC FreeBSD 4.3-RC #1: Fri Mar 30 09:42:06 IST 2001
	 amir@active.ath.cx:/usr/src/sys/compile/active  i386
	and do:
$ echo > /compat/linux/dev/null
sh: /compat/linux/dev/null: Device not configured
